narrative:
Oxford Township has 9,302 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
